title: Downstream frame generator — operator proof
summary: After Decision A seal with ENTER, the committed timeline contains frame 0 (opening) plus ordered downstream frames 1..n. Termination follows exactly one mode per unit (fixed bar count, until invalidation, or volatility cap). Frame 0 is never rewritten; downstream payloads carry only that bar's OHLCV plus pack context from the same row.

example_http.expect_after_enter_seal: 200 JSON with decision_frames[0].frame_type=opening and decision_frames[k].frame_type=downstream for k>=1, strict frame_index 0..n

deterministic_modes.ordering: frame_index equals strip bar index for downstream rows

deterministic_modes.stop: (high-low)/close >= threshold on strip[5] after emitting that bar
